title: Every Day Is Fun
overview: Dog is a pure optimist who holds out hope that today might be the day Sensei shares her snacks with him...

title: They're Both So Sweet
overview: After a rough day at work, Sensei is cheered up when Dog shoves a ball in her face. Even Cat shows concern for her in his own way.

title: In the Taxi
overview: While taking Cat to the vet via taxi, Sensei listens as the driver tells her about the cat he used to have.

title: When They Were Little
overview: Sensei recalls what Dog and Cat were like when they were little.

title: Will It Come Out Today?
overview: Dog once managed to spill the container his food is kept in, and he still tries to knock it over every day, optimistically hoping it will spill again. Cat, on the other hand, doesn't wait around for happy accidents.

title: The Vet
overview: Dog gets so excited by all the attention he gets at the vet's office, he doesn't even realize he's been given a shot. Cat, however, is less excitable...

title: My Previous Dog
overview: A conversation with her editor reminds Sensei of the dog she had before taking in her current dog and cat.

title: Sing and Dance
overview: When Dog breaks free while on a walk, all Sensei has to do to bring him back is sing and dance. Cat, however, is not so easily lured in...

title: The Ears Never Lie
overview: Sensei has no trouble understanding Dog's love of being petted. With Cat, it's all in the ears.

title: Playing
overview: Sensei has been trying out a new game with her dog and cat lately, and their reactions are quite different...

title: The Dog Before the Previous Dog
overview: Sensei recalls the dog she had as a child and reflects on how every pet has its own unique personality.

title: What It Means
overview: Sensei recalls how her cat reacted to her previous dog and does a little research into what his past behavior meant...

title: Volunteer
overview: Sensei recalls the days when she volunteered at a dog shelter... which happened to take in cats sometimes, too.

title: I'm Home
overview: Dog and Cat express their emotions in very different ways when Sensei returns home after being away for long periods.

title: Birthday
overview: Dog and Cat celebrate their birthdays in slightly different ways...

title: A Friend's Story
overview: Sensei reflects on Dog and Cat's advancing ages and hears a shocking story from her dog-loving friend.

title: The Vet
overview: Dog and Cat have very different reactions when it's time to see the vet.

title: An Unfamiliar Road
overview: Dog is excited to be taking a new and unfamiliar route while out on a walk, but when he realizes what the destination is...

title: Medicine
overview: Dog and Cat both get some medicine, but administering it is not as easy as the vet makes it sound...

title: Mother
overview: Sensei recalls the time when her childhood dog became a mother.

title: Brushing
overview: Sensei tries out some new grooming brushes for Dog and Cat.

title: Bones
overview: Sensei recalls an odd childhood habit she picked up when dining out with her family: she would secretly take the bones from her lamb roast home to give to the family dog.

title: I Can't Be Careless
overview: Dogs are notoriously light sleepers, which means you have to be careful about the noises you make...

title: Dog and Cat
overview: Sensei's mother reads the first volume of the Dog and Cat manga, and it prompts her to reflect on how much Dog and Cat have aged since it was written.
